title: membership — subprocessors
description: The Membership module engages ZERO direct third-party subprocessors — every state transition is first-party. Downstream: payment (PCI-DSS regulated stripe/paddle), notifications (email/SMS providers), storage (Wave 4+ for statement PDFs).

downstream_subprocessors_referenced.used_for: Payment tokenization + PaymentIntent settlement (Stripe/Paddle/Adyen). PCI-DSS scope lives there, not here.
Dispute lifecycle + evidence submission to gateway.
Membership notification delivery — email (Postmark/SES), SMS (Twilio), in-app.
Tax rate lookups via TaxJar / Avalara / Stripe Tax.

notes: GDPR Art. 30 requires this record even when empty — a zero-subprocessor module is still auditable.
The tenant DPA lists membership as processing 'contract-execution' data with legal-basis Art. 6(1)(b) — no third-party data flows out of this module directly.
